author: lOrm
content: Fix plan: (1) Add ChildGuard RAII struct with Drop impl that kills+waits child — eliminates zombie leak when ? early-returns from read_lsp_response. (2) Replace 500ms sleep with wait_for_readiness() that sends a documentSymbol probe (id=1001) and drains notifications until server replies, with 10s timeout. (3) Capture stderr via background thread into 1KiB ring buffer (Stdio::piped instead of Stdio::null). (4) Add 4 new tests: child guard drop test, readiness ok test, readiness timeout test, stderr ring-buffer test.
